task_description: Fix CUDA OOM errors on T4 GPU during text encoding step. The LLM (3B model loaded with device_map='auto') is not properly freed from VRAM after prompt expansion, leaving 13GB allocated when DualCLIPLoader tries to load the Gemma 3 12B fp8 text encoder. The fix involves aggressive VRAM cleanup with accelerate hook removal, triple garbage collection, VRAM verification checkpoints, and enforced sequential model loading.
